rows.label: tlk42360111_04_msg0001
rows.name: Have you ever played Money-Bye-Bye, mo?

rows.label: tlk42360111_04_msg0002
rows.name:
Alst is going through a tough time,
but it's a board game that everyone
in this wheelhouse is hooked on, mo.

rows.label: tlk42360111_04_msg0003
rows.name:
It's a board game I happened
to find in Luxuria, but it's
pretty intense, mo!

rows.label: tlk42360111_04_msg0004
rows.name:
It's a game where you roll dice,
buy and sell real estate, raise assets,
and bankrupt your opponents, mo!

rows.label: tlk42360111_04_msg0005
rows.name:
What's scary is that you can't
show mercy to opponents, so the mood
gradually becomes hostile, mo.

rows.label: tlk42360111_04_msg0006
rows.name:
Some people go crazy from the
brutal treatment, and it can
even lead to fistfights, mo!

rows.label: tlk42360111_04_msg0007
rows.name:
Thanks to that, wheelhouse is tense,
mo. Worried if Goldmund can run
normally tomorrow... mo.

rows.label: tlk42360111_04_msg0008
rows.name:
The person who came up with
this is a genius... mo.
